note: Per-category photo roles eBay prescribes in its Sell flow (the named photo slots: Front, Dial, Measurement, …). Observed from eBay listing forms on 2026-06-14; eBay does NOT expose these through its public API, so Bynari maintains the taxonomy itself. Roles cluster by category family — match an item's category name/path to a family. Absence of a match means eBay shows no prescribed slots for that category (e.g. computer keyboards), so Bynari shows no guidance.

roles.name: Packaging
roles.hint: Box or pouch, if it comes with one

roles.name: Front
roles.hint: Garment front, laid flat or on a form

roles.name: Measurement
roles.hint: Tape measure across the waist or chest
